use_cases: Display insurance policy holder information with avatar and policy details
Show policy status, coverage amount, and expiration in a card format
Provide quick overview of insurance policies in a dashboard or list view
ai_summary: An insurance policy card component designed to display policyholder information using an Avatar component along with policy details. The card likely presents key insurance data such as policy number, coverage type, premium amount, and policy status in a clean, organized layout suitable for fintech and insurance applications.
